name: FRC C++ Starter Kit
description: Everything you need to get started with FRC C++ robot development.

packages.reason: WPILib extension provides project creation and deployment.
Build system for compiling and deploying robot code.
Useful tools including Glass, Shuffleboard, and SmartDashboard.
Telemetry viewer for debugging and analysis.
Required if using CTRE motor controllers or sensors.
Required if using REV Robotics SPARK motor controllers.
Popular library for autonomous path planning.
